subcodes.title: Words to George Winterburn et al, spoken on 1904-02-06
subcodes.first_line: The existent world needs a uniting power to connect nations. There are various uniting powers in the world. One is patriotism
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @power of love, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @universal peace; world unity, @unity; oneness of humanity
